elements.name: clusterResourceName
elements.label: AKS cluster
elements.toolTip: Select the existing AKS cluster that will host the BYOL Terraform Enterprise platform.

elements.name: extensionResourceName
elements.label: Cluster extension resource name
elements.toolTip: Lowercase alphanumeric characters and hyphens only.

constraints.validationMessage: Use 6-30 lowercase alphanumeric characters or hyphens.

elements.name: namespace
elements.label: Namespace
elements.toolTip: Kubernetes namespace where the Marketplace extension installs Terraform Enterprise resources.

constraints.validationMessage: Use a valid Kubernetes namespace name.

elements.name: platformHostname
elements.label: Terraform Enterprise hostname
elements.toolTip: Fully qualified hostname used by Terraform Enterprise.

constraints.validationMessage: Use a valid hostname.

elements.name: serviceInternalLoadBalancer
elements.label: Use an internal Azure load balancer
elements.toolTip: Enable this when the Terraform Enterprise service should be reachable only from inside the virtual network.

elements.name: tfeStorageSizeGi
elements.label: Terraform Enterprise storage size
elements.toolTip: Persistent volume size for Terraform Enterprise data, specified in gibibytes.

constraints.validationMessage: Use the form 20Gi.

elements.name: keyVaultUrl
elements.label: Azure Key Vault URL
elements.toolTip: HTTPS endpoint of the Azure Key Vault that stores Terraform Enterprise secrets.

constraints.validationMessage: Use a valid Azure Key Vault URL.

elements.name: keyVaultClientId
elements.label: Key Vault workload identity client ID
elements.toolTip: Client ID of the user-assigned managed identity used to read secrets from Azure Key Vault.

constraints.validationMessage: Use a valid GUID.

elements.name: keyVaultTenantId
elements.label: Key Vault tenant ID
elements.toolTip: Microsoft Entra tenant ID that owns the Azure Key Vault identity.

constraints.validationMessage: Use a valid GUID.

elements.name: armClientId
elements.label: TFE agent workload identity client ID
elements.toolTip: Client ID of the managed identity that the Terraform Enterprise agent uses for Azure operations.

constraints.validationMessage: Use a valid GUID.

elements.name: armTenantId
elements.label: Azure tenant ID
elements.toolTip: Microsoft Entra tenant ID that Terraform Enterprise uses when authenticating to Azure.

constraints.validationMessage: Use a valid GUID.

elements.name: armSubscriptionId
elements.label: Azure subscription ID
elements.toolTip: Subscription ID that the Terraform Enterprise agent targets for Azure provisioning.

constraints.validationMessage: Use a valid GUID.

elements.name: databaseHost
elements.label: PostgreSQL host
elements.toolTip: Hostname and port for the external PostgreSQL server, for example postgres.example.corp:5432.

constraints.validationMessage: Use the form hostname:port.

elements.name: databaseName
elements.label: PostgreSQL database name
elements.toolTip: Database name that Terraform Enterprise uses inside the external PostgreSQL server.

constraints.validationMessage: Use a valid PostgreSQL database identifier.

elements.name: databaseUser
elements.label: PostgreSQL username
elements.toolTip: Database user that Terraform Enterprise uses to connect to PostgreSQL.

constraints.validationMessage: Use a valid PostgreSQL username.

elements.name: databaseParameters
elements.label: PostgreSQL parameters
elements.toolTip: Additional PostgreSQL connection parameters appended to the connection string.

constraints.validationMessage: Provide one or more PostgreSQL connection parameters.

elements.name: redisUrl
elements.label: Redis URL
elements.toolTip: Redis connection URL, including the scheme and port, used by Terraform Enterprise.

constraints.validationMessage: Use a valid Redis URL.

elements.name: objectStorageAccountName
elements.label: Azure storage account name
elements.toolTip: Storage account that Terraform Enterprise uses for object storage-backed services.

constraints.validationMessage: Use a valid Azure storage account name.

elements.name: objectStorageContainer
elements.label: Azure storage container
elements.toolTip: Blob container within the storage account used by Terraform Enterprise.

constraints.validationMessage: Use a valid Azure Blob container name.

elements.name: agentLogLevel
elements.label: TFE agent log level
elements.toolTip: Verbosity level for the Terraform Enterprise agent logs.

elements.name: vaultEnabled
elements.label: Enable external Vault integration
elements.toolTip: Enable this to source runtime secrets from an external HashiCorp Vault deployment.

elements.name: vaultAddress
elements.label: Vault address
elements.toolTip: HTTPS address of the external Vault API endpoint.

constraints.validationMessage: Use a valid HTTPS Vault URL.

elements.name: vaultClusterAddress
elements.label: Vault cluster address
elements.toolTip: HTTPS address of the Vault cluster endpoint used for intra-cluster coordination.

constraints.validationMessage: Use a valid HTTPS Vault cluster URL.

elements.name: vaultAuthMethod
elements.label: Vault auth method
elements.toolTip: Authentication method the Terraform Enterprise agent uses when logging into Vault.

elements.name: vaultRole
elements.label: Vault role
elements.toolTip: Vault role bound to the Terraform Enterprise agent service account.

constraints.validationMessage: Use a valid Vault role name.
